04],[285,522,1776531230720],[288,518,1776531230732],[290,515,1776531230750],[291,514,1776531230766],[290,514,1776531230773],[289,514,1776531230790],[288,513,1776531230802],[286,513,1776531230812],[284,512,1776531230835],[283,512,1776531230857],[284,513,1776531230866],[284,514,1776531230877],[285,515,1776531230887],[285,516,1776531230903],[286,516,1776531230913],[286,518,1776531230921],[287,519,1776531230936],[287,520,1776531230946],[288,520,1776531230959],[289,521,1776531230973],[290,522,1776531230986],[290,523,1776531231001],[291,524,1776531231015],[292,525,1776531231034],[292,526,1776531231046],[293,527,1776531231058],[294,527,1776531231068],[295,527,1776531231076],[296,528,1776531231083],[297,529,1776531231106],[297,530,1776531231119],[298,531,1776531231125],[299,532,1776531231140],[300,532,1776531231153],[300,533,1776531231159]],"mm-mp":18.54449648711944,"md":[[282,512,1776531230857]],"md-mp":3482.75,"mu":[[282,512,1776531231026]],"mu-mp":3506.25},"v":1,"tc":{}}
